zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bonville 6th Lord Harington於1442年4月出生在英國薩默塞特修頓時，他的父親William Bonville19歲，母親Elizabeth Harington19歲。他於1458年與Catherine Neville在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1460年12月31日在英國越可爾衛克菲德享年18歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bonville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Bonneville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bonville 6th Lord Harington was born in April 1442, in Chewton, Somerset, England, his father, William Bonville, was 19 and his mother, Elizabeth Harington, was 19. He married Catherine Neville in 1458, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 31 December 1460, in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 18.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bonville 6th Lord Harington est né en avril 1442, à Chewton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William Bonville, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Harington, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Neville en 1458, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1460, à Wakefield, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 18 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bonville 6th Lord Haringtonが1442年4月にイギリスソメルセトチェウトンで生まれた時，父William Bonvilleは19歳，母Elizabeth Haringtonは19歳であった。1458年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでCatherine Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1460年12月31日にイギリスヨークシュアイアワケフィールドで18歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bonville 6th Lord Harington(이)가 1442년 4월 영국 서머세트 체w턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bonville(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Harington(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1458년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Catherine Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 12월 31일 영국 요르크실르 웨이크필드에서 18세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bonville 6th Lord Harington родился апрель 1442 г. в местности чютон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени William Bonville было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Harington, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Neville в 1458 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 31 декабря 1460 г. в местности веикефиелд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 18 лет.
